use_cases: Selecting numeric values in pricing or settings interfaces
Adjusting volume, brightness, or playback controls in media applications
Filtering data by range in analytics dashboards
Setting quantity or amount inputs in e-commerce checkout flows
Configuring numeric parameters in developer tools or configuration panels
ai_summary: A configurable range slider component built on Radix UI primitives with CVA-powered variants for styling flexibility. Supports multiple sizes (sm to xl) and variants (default, destructive, ghost) with accessible focus states, disabled handling, and hover shadow effects on the thumb. Designed as an atomic UI primitive that integrates seamlessly into SaaS products, fintech dashboards, and data-driven applications requiring numeric range selection.
